    Cron Job Setting Instruction
    
                
            
    
            
    
                
    
                    
    
                        
     To automate Loan, DPS & FDR installments                             cron job  on your server.                             
    
                    
    
                    
    
                        
                        
    
                            

                            
    
                                
                            
    
                        
    
                    
    
                    
    
                        
                        
    
                            

                            
    
                                
                            
    
                        
    
                    
    
                    
    
                        
                        
    
                            

                            
    
                                
                            
    
                        
    
                    
    
                
    

                
    Set the cron time as minimum as possible. Twice per hour is ideal
